All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

application - package application
The application package contains classes with main() - methods executable by the Java VM.
Application - Class in application
Class Application is a simple application that implements the interface Runner to demonstrate the runtime system.
Application() - Constructor for class Application
 
asBoolean(String, Boolean...) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as a boolean.
asDouble(String, Double...) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as a double.
asInt(String, Integer...) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as an integer.
asIntList(String) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as a list of integers or an empty list [].
asList(String) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as a list of strings or an empty list [].

C

cmd() - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Returns the value of the cmd record component.
CommandRunner - Interface in runtimeSE
Interface CommandRunner defines the API of a utility that can split command line arguments by key-words ("commands") into several invocations of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.
CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance - Record Class in runtimeSE
Record CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance represents one invocation of the run(String command, KVArgs args) method on a single instance of a class that implements the CommandRunner interface.
CommandRunner.KVArgs - Interface in runtimeSE
Interface CommandRunner.KVArgs provides access to typed key-value arguments converted from bare String[] args command line arguments.
CommandRunnerInstance(CommandRunner, String, CommandRunner.KVArgs) - Constructor for record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Creates an instance of a CommandRunnerInstance record class.
create(CommandRunner, String, String) - Static method in interface CommandRunner
Return a list of command runner instances by splitting raw args[] by comma-separated words ("commands") in the commands argument.
createCommandRunnerInstances(CommandRunner, String, String) - Method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Create command runner instances for the given command runner, commands and command line arguments.

D

debug(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log a debug message.
Demo_1 - Class in application
Class Demo_1 is a demo application that implements the interfaces Runner and CommandRunner to demonstrate the runtime system.
Demo_1() - Constructor for class Demo_1
 

E

equals(Object) - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
error(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log an error message.

F

fatal(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log a fatal message.

G

getInstance() - Static method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Return the singleton instance of the runtime system.
getInstance() - Static method in interface RuntimeSE
Return the singleton instance of the RuntimeSE implementation.
getLogger(String) - Static method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Return named logger instance.
getLogger(String) - Static method in interface Logger
Return existing or new logger instance by name.

H

hashCode() - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hasKey(String) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return if the given key is present.

I

info(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log an info message.

K

keys() - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return a list of all present keys.
kvargs() - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Returns the value of the kvargs record component.

L

logger() - Method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Return the logger instance implementing the Logger interface.
logger() - Method in interface RuntimeSE
Return the logger instance implementing the Logger interface.
Logger - Interface in runtimeSE
Interface Logger defines the API of a simple logging utility that emulates log4j logging.
LoggerName - Static variable in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
 

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Application
The main method is the entry point of the Java application.

P

pickArgs(String, String[]) - Method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Select String[] args from command line (preferred) or from key in 'application.properties', if no command line arguments are given.
pickArgs(String, String[]) - Method in interface RuntimeSE
Select String[] args from command line (preferred) or from key in 'application.properties', if no command line arguments are given.
priority() - Element in annotation interface Runner.Accessors
 
properties() - Method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Return Properties loaded from the application.properties
properties() - Method in interface RuntimeSE
Return Properties loaded from the application.properties

R

run(CommandRunner, String, String) - Static method in interface CommandRunner
Split and run command runner instances by invoking method run(String command, KVArgs args) on each created instance.
run(RuntimeSE, String[]) - Method in class Application
Method run is called by the runtimeSE system after instantiation of a class that implements this interface.
run(RuntimeSE, String[]) - Method in class Demo_1
Method run is called by the runtimeSE system after instantiation of a class that implements this interface.
run(RuntimeSE, String[]) - Method in interface Runner
Method run is called by the runtimeSE system after instantiation of a class that implements this interface.
run(RuntimeSE, String, CommandRunner.KVArgs) - Method in class Demo_1
Method invoked for a command with key-value arguments.
run(RuntimeSE, String, CommandRunner.KVArgs) - Method in interface CommandRunner
Method invoked for a command with key-value arguments.
runner() - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Returns the value of the runner record component.
Runner - Interface in runtimeSE
Interface Runner defines the contract for "runnable" classes that are detected during class scanning and selected by the application.run.policy property.
Runner.Accessors - Annotation Interface in runtimeSE
Annotation Runner.Accessors is used to define the order by priority) of a class that implements the Runner interface for bean instantiation and execution by the runtimeSE system.
runtimeSE - module runtimeSE
Module declaration of the runtimeSE module that provides a simple runtime environment for Java applications with support for: application.properties file. a simple logging utility. Inversion-of-Control by scanning for class that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors). advanced CommandRunner interface with command splitting and String[] args type conversion.
runtimeSE - package runtimeSE
The runtimeSE package declares public interfaces of the runtime module.
RuntimeSE - Interface in runtimeSE
Interface RuntimeSE defines the public API of the runtimeSE module.
RuntimeSE_Impl - Class in runtimeSE.impl
Class RuntimeSE_Impl provides the access point to non-public implementation classes of the package runtime.impl.
runtimeSE.impl - package runtimeSE.impl
The runtimeSE.impl package provides the access point to the non-public implementation classes of the runtime package.

S

startup(String[]) - Method in class runtimeSE.impl.RuntimeSE_Impl
Start up the runtime environment by scanning for classes that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors).
startup(String[]) - Method in interface RuntimeSE
Start up the runtime environment by scanning for classes that implement the Runner interface, creating singleton bean objects and invoking their run(String[] args) method depending on a priority (see Runner.Accessors).

T

toString() - Method in record class CommandRunner.CommandRunnerInstance
Returns a string representation of this record class.
trace(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log a trace message.

V

value(String, String...) - Method in interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Return value associated with the key as a string.

W

warn(String) - Method in interface Logger
Log a warn message.
